---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that waify doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. CLI flag, TUI change, new provider/transport, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — examples, links, mockups.
